examples: Few mathematical constructs seem as conceptually simple as that of randomness.
Conceptually, e-commerce does not differ from well-known commercial offerings such as banking by phone, "mail order" catalogs, or sending a purchase order to supplier via fax.
But conceptually it is very similar.
If you think spending is out of control, you are precisely correct, and conceptually wrong.
Conceptually, there are merits to either system: and we do in fact tend to use both.
